# Confluence Automation — GitHub Copilot

## Mandatory first step (every invocation)

Read:

1. `.cursor/skill-library/confluence-workflow.md`

When adding Confluence skills, create `.cursor/skill-library/confluence-<topic>.md` and append to `.cursor/agents/confluence-automation.md` and this list.

## After skills are loaded

Follow the same workflow and safety rules as `.cursor/agents/confluence-automation.md`.

Registry: `.github/copilot/AGENT-SKILL-BINDINGS.md`.
